reviews.review_description:
Im on level where it says 2 heads and 2 arms wi
th a white key i cant get out off it how can i

developer_response.body: Hi, there is a video on youtube how to solve it. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aTLxw2B6yt0

reviews.review_description: Too bad because this could have been super cool. If you drop anything, it's gone for good, and you have to start over, which is fine until you need to open a door with the same hand you're holding a key in. At that point, it's game over. I hope the developers will fix this bug because it will be a nice little horror experience if it's playable.

developer_response.body: Hello, if you drop something it is not gone. It returns back to your inventory. If you used it,  it disappear, because you dont need it more.

reviews.review_description:
Edited: saw devs mention inventory. Click a button and it will pop up. Helpful info. Enjoying the rest of the game.

Drop anything and it vanishes. I grabbed the yellow key and the door closes. You need to let go of the key to turn the knob. Then it vanishes. Game over. Fix your game
For current sale price (under $5), this is an excellent VR experience for new VR users. Several jump scare but very intuative puzzles and turly enjoyable experience.

If you enjoy jump scares and escape rooms, you will like this game, but if you are looking for real horror with creepy scares and though provoking mystery, this isn't it.   With some work it could have possibilities.  The rooms need more details, like spiderwebs, blood stains on walls, creaking floors, haunted paintings, floating ghosts & furniture and more of the things you expect in a scary home. Most rooms have the bare minimum of things in them. (more atmosphere) You never feel like you're in danger or need to get out as fast as you can. You know when a jump scare is about to happen (very predictable) The puzzles are fairly easy once you figure out what you are looking for and where the pieces are. This game is very similar to "House of the Butcher" except "house" has a bad guy leather face type chasing you the entire time. In this game it's only during short portions of a section of the house.
If you really like jump scares vr games this is it I lost how many times I had jumped haha graphic everything look super good worth getting only for 99 cent on sale get it super fun and jump scares

reviews.review_title: Not even worth the $1 it cost me...
reviews.review_description:
The game has very little to nothing going for it. 
"Is it fun?" - No. The "gameplay" is you just walking around (very slowly) and randomly looking for whatever glowy items you can find, which are literally the only objects outside of drawer andvdoor handles you canveven interact with anyway.

"are there puzzles?"  - Again, no. There's finding items and putting them somewhere else. Always in the same general area of the house at that. There's 2 very lite-puzzles at the very end, but they aren't brain teasers in any real way. So it's just a walking and item hunting simulator.

"Is there any story?" - Yet again, no. There's small details of the residents being crazy killers and evenbdevil worshipers I guess, but it's literally just you walking into their house after crashing your car. No dialogue even....

"Is it ATLEAST scary?"- No... they try jumpscares frequently, but it's 99% limited to "monster/ killer in your face screaming!"  and then immediately fades back to normal like nothing happened... 
Even when they do decent with the atmosphere/ slight creeps like going into a room with a dead older woman just staring at you while rocking in her chair, her head following you as you move; they immediately ruin it with the 10th da*n telegraphed "jump scare" again, which wasn't scary when they did this 9 literally rinced and repeated jump scares ago (ALL of which are very obvious/ telegraphed).
It is funny at times though with how hard it seems to be trying to scare you. Hopefully that's sort of the joke and is intentional. 😅

With even the sounds being very repetitive (though the graphics are ok and do the job for the most part) the game just has nothing even worth $1 for it...
Its a horror game that has no story, which would be fine if its fun to play. But its not fun really, but add on not even being scary (making you roll your eyes after the 3rd "jump scare"), and its a waste...

This game wasted my time and my money (luckily only a dollar...), anf that's all it did for me..
I HIGHLY recommend spending justca few more bucks on the many better horror titles out there. Save your time and money from this one.
Good fun love this game to developers can you not make other horror games like this

reviews.review_title: Favorite and Funniest Horror VR Game Yet
reviews.review_description:
Horror VR Game- Puzzles and Jumpscares

Your mission is to escape the house. This is my new favorite horror game. It’s so funny. This game had me laughing so much. It got me twice though for someone who doesn’t scare easily. I love puzzle games and I love horror games. Perfect! Enter if you dare. Not for the weak. 😂

A Great little horror game I'm impressed as made me jump etc quite a few times which will be the new "try this game out on my  headset guys!" at the next house party .... Should create a good laugh watching them poo themselves..

Cursed night well it made me curse a few times so can only play when no kids about but I  play seated and now I'm stuck as I can't pick 1 item up so will have to start again and play standing but dare I go back in the house if you're after the scariest game then this is it and at this price.   Message for development I started game again this time standing I was too tall any chance you could add seated mode cause for some strange reason I want back in that house

Reminds me so much of texas chainsaw.. I legit jumped a few times .. And i dont scare easy .. Im pretty impressed with this game... Definitely wear earphones and stand while playing with the volume full blast.. Promise this game is worth getting and super scary

...Call me a coward, but yes, this game made me jump,  scream and curse!!! The first time I played it didn't make it to 15 min. and I had to shut the thing off to take a break. And believe me I'm not exaggerating.

The only downside for me is the slow movements. Wish I could walk a bit faster from time to time!!!

Highly recommend!!!
And if you play it, please use some headphones and crank that volume up!!!
For such a cheap price I highly recommend. It has great graphics and it is very scary.!!

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing our game! :)

reviews.review_description: This is game is so scary  game to play it's my favorite it's so awesome fells like a hunted house it's so cool you did a great job on it

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing our game! :)

reviews.review_description: Scary af
One of the best horror game for quest. It has great graphics, great atmosphere. This game is so scary.

developer_response.body: Hello! Thank you for your review! :)

reviews.review_title: Looks like the Oculus Go version
reviews.review_description: This doesn't look that much different from the Oculus Go version.  The main difference aside from 6DOF, is that the interactions, especially opening doors, are more difficult. I'd be happy to pay $15 for a version that takes advantage of the Quest's hardware, but not for a port of a Go game.

developer_response.body: Hello! We are sorry that you not see the differences, because it was NOT ported from the go version. It was ported from PCVR version, which is using totally different models and textures. So it is same like the PCVR version, just with Quest 2 friendly textures. Of course the storyline is the same in all versions, because it is the same game, but the graphics not.

reviews.review_description:
Better than expected. Great scary stuff. 👍🏻

Would like to see a seated mode with crouch button added. Seems to forget my turn setting each time as well.

developer_response.body: Hello! Thank you for your review! Seated mode will come in the future. :)

reviews.review_description: Jump scares were meh, could see them coming from a mile away with classic tropes. Light goes off or grabbing something and turn around. It froze your movement to experience it and build up is so slow that most of the time I ended up just waving at the monster until the jump scare experience was over. Last puzzle is severely bugged. Got to the end and not sure what the ending is. Puzzles were meh. If you startle easily, maybe pick it up — but … eh.
